title: ardisia melastomoides
intro: Ardisia melastomoides, also known as the Coral Berry or Coral Palm, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Sapotaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, as well as being used to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. Ardisia melastomoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine practices in various forms, including dried roots and berries.
